hero.title: Share tools,
hero.subtitle: Borrow and lend rarely used tools and equipment within your neighborhood. Save money, reduce waste, and help your community thrive.

hook.title: Share & Care
hook.desc: Share items you no longer use with others in your community. Every tool shared saves money, reduces waste, and brings neighbors closer together.

howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to start sharing

step1.desc: Search for tools and equipment near you, from drills to camping gear.

step2.title: Request to Borrow
step2.desc: Send a borrow request to the owner. They'll approve it in a tap.

step3.title: Use & Return
step3.desc: Pick up, use it, return it. Rate each other to build community trust.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: ShareShelf was born from a simple observation: every household has tools gathering dust, while neighbors are buying the same tools for one-time use. We asked ourselves — what if we could bring the age-old tradition of neighborly sharing into the digital age?
story.p2: From power drills to camping gear, from kitchen appliances to gardening tools — most items are used only a handful of times per year. ShareShelf connects people who need tools with neighbors who have them, creating a community-driven alternative to buying everything new.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.p1: We're on a mission to make every neighborhood a sharing community. By making it safe and easy to borrow and lend, we reduce waste, save money, and — most importantly — bring neighbors together.

trust.title: Trust
trust.desc: Every interaction builds reputation. Our trust score system ensures accountability.

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.desc: We believe sharing is caring. Borrowing beats buying for items you rarely use.

community.title: Community
community.desc: Strong neighborhoods are built on mutual support and knowing your neighbors.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.desc: Fewer purchases mean less waste. Sharing is one of the simplest ways to reduce your environmental footprint.

readme.title: How to Use ShareShelf
readme.subtitle: Everything you need to know to start sharing tools in your community

step1.title: 1. Create an Account
step1.desc: Sign up with your name, email, and password. Optionally add your community name so neighbors can find you.

step2.title: 2. Browse Tools
step2.desc: Search by name or filter by category to find the tool you need. Check availability status and owner ratings.

step3.title: 3. Send a Borrow Request
step3.desc: Found what you need? Click "Request to Borrow" and optionally add a message to the owner.

step4.title: 4. Coordinate Pickup
step4.desc: Once approved, coordinate with the owner for pickup. Exchange contact details as needed.

step5.title: 5. Use with Care & Return
step5.desc: Treat borrowed items like your own. Return on time and leave a review to build community trust.

safety.title: Safety Tips
safety.tip1: Always check the owner's trust score and reviews before borrowing
safety.tip2: Use the in-app messaging to coordinate pickup and return
safety.tip3: Meet in public places for exchanges when possible
safety.tip4: Document the item's condition with photos at pickup and return
safety.tip5: Report any issues promptly through the app

q1.a: Yes! ShareShelf is completely free. We believe sharing should be accessible to everyone.

q2.q: What if an item gets damaged?
q2.a: The deposit system helps protect owners. Open communication between borrower and owner is key — most issues are resolved amicably.

rules.title: Community Rules
rules.rule1: Be respectful — treat others and their property with care
rules.rule2: Return items on time as agreed with the owner
rules.rule3: Leave honest reviews after every transaction

footer.aboutDesc: Community-powered tool sharing. Save money, reduce waste, build community.
footer.communityDesc: Join your neighborhood tool-sharing network. Borrow what you need, lend what you have.
footer.builtWith: Built with love for communities everywhere.
